## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Augment Code's growth strategy and GrowthX's role in driving organic traffic and SEO efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Augment Code is shifting focus from self-serve to sales-led growth (60/40 split)](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Need to establish clear goals and metrics for GrowthX's contributions, particularly in organic traffic and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Planning a more in-depth strategy session in early October to align on objectives and priorities](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [Current SEO efforts showing some progress, but need to scale and focus on high-impact areas](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Topics

### Augment Code's Growth Strategy Shift

  - [Moving from self-serve first (60%) to sales-led (60%) approach](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Targeting professional developers likely to convert to team deals](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Reducing focus on solo developers and influencer marketing](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [Aiming for senior devs or those working at larger companies (e.g., DoorDash)](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)

### GrowthX's Role and Accountability

  - [Current lack of clear metrics and goals for GrowthX's contributions](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Need to establish specific OKRs for organic traffic, LLM presence, and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Proposed goals:](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
      - [Increase organic traffic to SEO content pages](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
      - [Boost LLM traffic (e.g., from 28% to 60% presence in top 20 queries)](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
      - [Drive 5,000 visits per month from LLMs by end of November](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
      - [Generate 200-300 sign-ups from LLM channel (based on 4% conversion rate)](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)

### SEO and Content Strategy

  - [Making progress on backlink building and citations in AI coding tool listings](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Need to improve presence in key LLM results (e.g., ChatGPT, Google AI)](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Planning to restructure website content:](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
      - [Separate sections for questions, guides, and potentially a glossary](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
      - [Focus on high-performing categories, especially for citations](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)

### Newsletter Strategy

  - [Current newsletter efforts may not align with primary growth objectives](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Need to evaluate ROI and impact on user acquisition/retention](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [Consider repurposing newsletter efforts towards more impactful SEO content](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)

### Augie CLI Project

  - [Ongoing development of CLI commands](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
  - [Need to review and prioritize command backlog](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [Jason to provide a curated list of commands for review](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule in-depth strategy session for early October (likely October 11th afternoon)](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [Jason to prepare a dashboard showing key SEO and traffic metrics](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [Conduct geo-experiment on existing content to test performance improvements](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Review and prioritize Augie CLI command backlog](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)
  - [Reassess newsletter strategy and its alignment with growth objectives](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Establish clear OKRs for GrowthX's contributions, focusing on organic traffic and LLM presence](https://fathom.video/share/cTMqZaNDmeQ3jxdyGcfjqTvW4LXRYkRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
